Name: sapdme_inventory_v2
Title: Inventory
ShortText: Perform inventory relevant activities, such as retrieving stock information and updating stock data.
Description: This service enables you to perform inventory related actions that include but are not limited to retrieving stock information and return stock from SAP Digital Manufacturing to integrated ERP systems.
ChangeLog: [{"date":"17 Mar 2026","notes":"1) Added the 'bomComponentSequence' property in the response payload of get goods issues API. 2) Updated the 'size' parameter validation rule of get goods receipts API: the maximum page size has been increased from 100 to 500. 3) Updated the 'size' parameter validation rule of get goods issues API: the maximum page size has been increased from 100 to 500.","state":"Active","version":"v2"},{"date":"15 Feb 2026","notes":"1) Added a new API endpoint for retrieving posted goods receipts: /inventory/goodsReceipts. 2) Added an API for submitting EWM goods receipts: /inventory/ewmGoodsReceipts. 3) Enhanced the PATCH stock API by including the 'serialNumber' in the request payload. 4) Added an API for retrieving posted goods issues: /inventory/goodsIssues.","state":"Active","version":"v2"},{"date":"16 Nov 2025","notes":"First version","state":"Active","version":"v2"}]
